overview: Rizz Me If You Can is a mobile-first, progression-based social strategy game where users practice flirting and social intelligence with emotionally dynamic AI characters. Features Free vs Pro plans with configurable limits and upgrade prompts.
features: Free vs Pro plan structure with configurable Free Plan limits
Daily ranked session limits for Free users (default: 3/day)
Per-session Rizz Assist limits for Free users (default: 1/session)
Per-session Hint limits for Free users (default: 3/session)
Admin Panel Free Plan Settings with editable limits
Admin User Management with plan column and Free/Pro switcher
Upgrade modal (Unlock Rizz Pro) on limit hits — no payments yet
Tempting upgrade prompts that preserve immersion
5-round ranked AI chat sessions with emotional AI characters
